prestazioni: Engine swap to Mazda's Skyactiv-X 2.0L SPCCI (Skyactiv-X M Hybrid) with a custom Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger, forged internals (CP pistons, Eagle H-beam rods), and a Motec M150 ECU for precise SPCCI combustion control and forced induction mapping

Full titanium exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power Ti, featuring 3.5-inch piping, dual 4.5-inch titanium tips, and a custom 304 stainless steel mid-section with a secondary catalytic converter delete for optimized turbo spool and SPCCI efficiency

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 30-way adjustable damping, custom spring rates (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear), and chassis-specific top mounts for the KAI Concept's Skyactiv-Body 2 platform, paired with Cusco front strut bar and rear tower brace
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit for the KAI Concept, featuring carbon fiber fenders, custom front bumper with integrated canards, and a rear diffuser with dual exhaust cutouts, all finished in Mazda's Soul Red Crystal paint with matte black accents

Custom carbon fiber hood by Seibon with a functional central vent for the GTX3582R turbo, paired with a carbon fiber roof panel and rear spoiler from Veilside, both utilizing pre-preg autoclave construction for weight reduction

BBS CI-R 19x10.5 +25 front and 19x12 +35 rear wheels in Hyper Black finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/19 front, 315/30/19 rear), with custom wheel spacers by Work Wheels for aggressive flush fitment
